name: Video Game Company
description:
This is my attempt at creating an RPG focused on becoming a video game developer. You can play as an indie developer, the new CEO of Steam or Epic, or anything else you can imagine— as long as it’s related to game development. From building games to creating game engines, the choice is yours.

---======{{~~~|~~~}}======---

About this bot

---======{{~~~|~~~}}======---

The bot will react to everything you do. Every update, DLC, new game, or even posts on X, Reddit, and other platforms—it will respond to all of it. You can share teasers, announce new directions as a developer, and experiment freely. However, be mindful—poor decisions or negative actions may lead to losing fans and could impact your income.

---======{{~~~|~~~}}======---

Any comments that are dehumanizing, racist, sexist, misogynistic, or misandrist will be removed. Constructive criticism is encouraged, and you are free to share feedback openly. However, personal attacks or harmful behavior toward others will not be tolerated. While it may seem unlikely in this context, some people always find a way—so this rule stands.
creator: 6GodKing6
